Tt. 17 ( 10)/2015- ktrfitt-Niid 3i.(4‘ui Tait *1 1:fr-44 MINISTRY OFENVIRONMENT, FORESTAND CLIMATE CHANCE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th March, 2016 S.O. 1092(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 6 read with Section 7 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 (19 of 2010), the Central Government hereby appoints Dr. Satyawan Singh Garbyal, H. No. C-1/71 Bapa Nagar, New Delhi-110003, as the Expert Member of the National Green Tribunal with effect from I 3th January, 2016 for a period of five years or till he attains the age of sixty five years or till further orders, whichever is the earliest. [F. No. 17(10)/2015-PUNGT(Volip] ARUN KUMAR MEHTA, It. I 094(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections ( I) and (3) of Section 6 read with Section 7 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 (19 of 2010), the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Justice Sonam Phintso Wangdi, former Judge of Sikkim High Court, as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal with effect from 22"d January. 2016 for a period of five years or till he attains the age of sixty seven years or till further orders, whichever is the earliest.
